message:
test(core): expand cbor(+107), tailscale(+89), registry(+91), webhook(+86) tests

fcp-cbor: 184→291 tests. Added CBOR encoding roundtrips, canonical
byte-level checks, float/integer boundaries, unicode strings,
error paths, schema version sensitivity, and stability tests.

fcp-tailscale: 223→312 tests across 4 files. Expanded error,
tag, identity, and client modules with edge cases for zone
mapping, ACL rules, node identity, and attestation.

fcp-registry: 226→317 tests. Added supply chain types, attestation,
TUF metadata, Sigstore bundles, verification results, hash/signature
functions, error display, and policy enforcement coverage.

fcp-webhook: 280→366 tests across 5 files. Expanded error, signature,
event, handler, and provider modules with unicode, large payloads,
DLQ, router, and provider-specific verification tests.

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
